subcodes.first_line: The letter of the ninth of Dhi'l-Qa'dah 37 was received and its contents were noted. For several years His Honour Amín hath been deserving of the highest praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ۹ ذی القعده ۳۷ رسید مضمون معلوم گردید حضرت امین چند سال است نهایت ستایش
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
